data.title: Jameson Irish Whiskey partners with NFL for first-ever game in Dublin at Croke Park on Sept. 28, 2025, celebrating with hometown spirit.
data.description: Jameson Irish Whiskey, the top-ranked Irish whiskey globally, is set to capture the essence of its homeland by catering to American football enthusiasts in Ireland during the game between the Minnesota Vikings and Pittsburgh Steelers at Croke Park on September 28, 2025. In a press release on September 25, 2025, the brand revealed its plans to offer its spirits at the event.

data.title: Google acquires 5.4% stake in Cipher Mining, with 24 million warrants in a $5 billion AI hosting deal, backstopping $1.4 billion for Texas data center, transforming CIFR into AI-crypto hybrid bet.
data.description: Cipher Mining Inc (CIFR) has recently received a significant endorsement from Alphabet Inc (GOOGL)(GOOG) as Google acquired a 5.4% stake in the Bitcoin miner. This deal includes about 24 million warrants as part of a 10-year agreement worth $5 billion focused on AI hosting. This move by Google provides substantial financial backing for Cipher's Texas data center expansion, securing $1.4 billion in financing. This partnership elevates Cipher from a specialized miner to a strategic play on the convergence of AI and cryptocurrency. This development comes amidst the unveiling of a $400 billion Stargate data project by OpenAI, SoftBank, and their collaborators. The stock performance of CIFR is worth watching in light of these recent developments.

The Panama Canal announced that lawmakers have approved a $5.21 billion budget for fiscal year 2025/26. Of this, $3.19 billion is expected to be contributed to the national treasury, marking a 14.5% increase year-on-year.

data.title: Raintree introduces NoteIQ™ AI-powered documentation at TherapyCon '25, eliminates manual input, validates info in UI.
data.description: NoteIQ™, an innovative AI-driven documentation tool, revolutionizes the process by removing the requirement for manual data entry or verification in Raintree's cutting-edge interface. The groundbreaking technology eliminates the need for manual intervention, offering a seamless experience for users. This development was announced in Chandler, Arizona on September 25, 2025, through a press release from PRNewswire. The tool is set to benefit hundreds of rehabilitation and physical therapy practitioners by boosting efficiency and accuracy in their daily tasks.

data.title: Bitcoin's value sinks under $109K, facing a steep decline. However, data reveals increasing spot buyers amidst the sell-off.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped to a new low below $109,000, with charts indicating a continuing sell-off. However, data reveals that spot buyers are ramping up their accumulation efforts amidst the market downturn.

data.title: Toll Brothers offers last chance to buy luxury home in Millstone community, NC. Limited opportunities left. NYSE:TOL.
data.description: CARY, N.C., September 25, 2025 - Renowned luxury homebuilder Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL) revealed that there are only a few available chances left to construct a new Toll Brothers residence in the exclusive Millstone neighborhood in Cary, North Carolina. This upscale community offers high-end living spaces and amenities for discerning buyers. Toll Brothers continues to showcase their expertise as the top builder of luxury homes in the nation. For interested individuals, this is a rare opportunity to secure a home in one of Cary's most prestigious locales.

data.title: A2 acquired by Theatre Capital and Trajectory Capital for growth. CEO and team to remain, A2 Holdco formed.
data.description: A data and analytical software solutions company for trade and professional associations, Association Analytics (A2) from Arlington, Virginia, has finalized the sale of important assets to Theatre Capital and Trajectory Capital. The partnership with these entities, along with CEO Alex DeBarr and the current A2 management team, aims to support the growth of the Company’s platforms. A2 Holdco LLC, the newly established entity by Theatre and Trajectory, will now possess these assets for further development.

data.title: Sierra Space's Dream Chaser spaceplane set for first free-flyer demo flight, delivering critical data to NASA.
data.description: Sierra Space, based in Louisville, Colorado, a reputable Defense Tech firm specializing in solutions for critical national missions and enhancing space security, has revealed a strategic shift for its Dream Chaser® spaceplane. The initial flight of the Dream Chaser will be a free-flyer demo mission designed to validate the technology and offer essential data to NASA. This decision allows Sierra Space to be adaptable in addressing the nation's most pressing needs.

data.title: ÍL Fund is holding a switch auction on Sep 30, 2025, offering to purchase IBN 38 0101 at a clean price of 42.7676, yielding 3.45%, against delivery of RIKS 34 1016 at a clean price of 104.1411, yielding 2.97%. Auction results announced at 12:00.
data.description: On Tuesday, September 30, 2025, ÍL Fund is conducting a switch auction from 10:30 to 11:00 hrs. The auction involves purchasing IBN 38 0101 (IS0000001162) at a clean price of 42.7676, yielding 3.45%, and exchanging it for the inflation-linked government bond series RIKS 34 1016 (IS0000037737) at a clean price of 104.1411, yielding 2.97%. The auction results will be disclosed publicly at 12:00 on the same day.

data.title: Freddie Mac sells $487 million in non-performing loans, introducing pool for smaller investors.
data.description: A single Extended Timeline Pool is being offered to smaller investors, aiming to broaden their investment opportunities. This pool targets individuals looking to diversify their portfolios with more accessible options. This initiative serves to provide investors with the potential to achieve favorable returns on their investments while catering specifically to those with limited resources. By including a pool that offers an extended timeline, smaller investors can benefit from a flexible investment option that aligns with their long-term financial goals. This opportunity seeks to democratize investing by allowing a broader range of individuals to participate, with the goal of creating a more inclusive investment environment.
LOGAN: MONEY MARKETS HAVE CHANGED, FED FUNDS TARGET IS OUTDATED

data.title: Data breach at PNC Financial Services in Sept 2025, investigated by Edelson Lechtzin LLP for compromised customer data.
data.description: A legal investigation is currently underway at the Newtown-based law firm Edelson Lechtzin LLP concerning data privacy issues related to a recent breach at PNC Financial Services. Discovered early last month, the breach has prompted scrutiny. Individuals seeking consultation on this matter with legal representation are encouraged to reach out for further information and assistance.

data.title: Amazon to pay $2.5 billion in FTC lawsuit, $1 billion in fines and $1.5 billion in customer compensation, each eligible user expected to receive around $51.
data.description: E-commerce giant Amazon.com, Inc. has reached a settlement of $2.5 billion after allegations of deceptive practices regarding its Prime subscription service. The settlement includes $1 billion in fines and $1.5 billion to compensate affected customers, with each eligible user estimated to receive around $51. This agreement follows a lawsuit from the Federal Trade Commission in 2023 challenging Amazon's treatment of customers. The deal, announced recently, marks one of the largest settlements by the FTC. While Amazon did not admit liability, they did not dispute the accusations. This news has resulted in movement in the company's stock. For more details, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trump administration reviewing medical imports to assess reliance on foreign suppliers. National security review initiated on Sept. 2 under Section 232. Public input sought for analysis.
data.description: Under the Trump administration, the U.S. Commerce Department has started a national security evaluation of medical imports, including Personal Protective Equipment (PPE), consumables, and medical devices, to assess the dependency on foreign suppliers for essential health products. The review was initiated on September 2nd under Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962, enabling the government to determine if specific imports pose a threat to U.S. security or industrial capabilities. Public feedback, consisting of data, analyses, and comments, is being requested. Commenters are encouraged to submit scanned documents instead of digitally altered files.

data.title: Minnesota Dental Association announces 2025-2026 officers and trustees in Minneapolis, with Dr. Wagnild as president.
data.description: In Minneapolis on September 19, 2025, the Minnesota Dental Association's Leadership Conference saw the installation of new officers and trustees. Dr. Scott Wagnild took on the role of president for the term 2025-2026, while Dr. John Noack became the president-elect.

data.title: ASPCA offers $2.5 million in grants for shelters to improve animal welfare. Applications open until Oct 17.
data.description: Proposals are currently being accepted until October 17 for grant funding totaling over $2.5 million, aimed at enhancing results for animals and expanding care accessibility at shelters. This initiative is led by the ASPCA® (The American Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals®).

data.title: Author Michael Beck shares moving memoir about battling autism, homelessness, and ADHD, published by Liberty Hill Publishing. A must-read for those facing mental health challenges.
data.description: A compelling new book from Liberty Hill Publishing is now available for individuals dealing with autism, depression, addiction, grief, and other mental health issues. Authored by Michael Beck, this book provides a unique insight into his life with autism. Released on September 25, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, this is a must-read for those navigating similar challenges.

data.title: Royce Small-Cap Trust (NYSE:RVT) is the oldest and largest small-cap closed-end fund with an average weekly trading volume of 1,542,518 shares. Adviser has over 50 years of experience. As of 08/31/25, NAV is 17.98 and MKT is 16.06.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in New York, the oldest and biggest small-cap closed-end fund with an average weekly trading volume of around 1,542,518 shares made headlines. The fund's advisor boasts over 50 years of expertise in small- and micro-cap investments. As of August 31, 2025, the closing prices were observed at a Net Asset Value (NAV) of $17.98 and a Market Value (MKT) of $16.06 for the fund.

data.title: Cailin Birch from EIU to keynote at IPA AltsGlobal in London. Registration open for premier event on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: Registration is now available for a prestigious global conference on alternative investments to be held in London on September 25, 2025. The Institute for Portfolio Alternatives (IPA) has confirmed that Cailin Birch, the Principal Global Economist at The Economist Intelligence Unit (EIU), will be a keynote speaker at the event.

data.title: Everlight Solar wins 2025 Best Perks & Benefits award, recognizing commitment to employee support and incentives.
data.description: In Verona, Wisconsin on September 25, 2025, Everlight Solar was proudly awarded Comparably's Best Perks & Benefits accolade for 2025. This prestigious recognition highlights the company's dedication to offering employees extensive support, valuable incentives, and enriching benefits, showcasing their commitment to employee well-being and satisfaction.
